_comment: Installer-only file. Restaurant info is NEVER set here — the owner provides it via Telegram during onboarding, and the orchestrator writes it to social-marketing/restaurant-profile.json. This file holds API plumbing only.

composio._comment: Primary integration is Composio MCP. The MCP server key (ck_…) is set up per-client in https://app.composio.dev → MCP Servers, and registered in Hermes via ~/.hermes/config.yaml (see INSTALLER.md). The REST API key + userId are OPTIONAL and only used by cron scripts (daily-report.js, weekly-research.js) that run outside the agent loop.

imageGen._comment: Image generation only. Chat, captions, and research all run on Hermes's configured model — not set here. Update model when a new image model ships on OpenRouter (https://openrouter.ai/models).
